title: Gymnopteris quercifolia
taxonomy: Gymnopteris quercifolia is a species of fern, which belongs to the family Osmundaceae. It is a genus of extinct ferns. The exact classification of Gymnopteris quercifolia is still being researched and may be subject to change as new information becomes available. However, it is known to be part of the division Pteridophyta and the phylum Tracheophyta. Gymnopteris quercifolia's classification is also associated with the kingdom Plantae.

It is used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues, including fever and digestive problems.
